title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| INDIAN AIR FORCE INVITES ONLINE APPLICATIONS FROM UNMARRIED INDIAN MALE AND FEMALE CANDIDATES FOR SELECTION TEST FOR AGNIVEERVAYU INTAKE 01/2026 UNDER AGNIPATH SCHEME | INDIAN AIR FORCE INVITES ONLINE APPLICATIONS FROM UNMARRIED INDIAN MALE AND FEMALE CANDIDATES FOR SELECTION TEST FOR AGNIVEERVAYU INTAKE 01/2026 UNDER AGNIPATH SCHEME | 07/01/2025 | 27/01/2025 | |
| For the post of Assistant Public Prosecutor for the Ld. Judicial Magistrate and Ld. Executive Magistrate Court under West Tripura District. | For the post of Assistant Public Prosecutor for the Ld. Judicial Magistrate and Ld. Executive Magistrate Court under West Tripura District. | 12/12/2024 | 19/12/2024 | |
| For the post of Public Prosecutor & Addl. Public Prosecutor under West Tripura District are hereby requested to appear before the Selection Committee for interview on 17/12/2024 at 11.00 A.M. | For the post of Public Prosecutor & Addl. Public Prosecutor under West Tripura District are hereby requested to appear before the Selection Committee for interview on 17/12/2024 at 11.00 A.M. | 12/12/2024 | 17/12/2024 | |
| Applications in plain paper are invited from the suitable candidate for the post of Assistant Public prosecutor- 31 (thirty one) posts in the Court of Ld. Judicial Magistrate and Ld. Executive Magistrate under West Tripura District. | Applications in plain paper are invited from the suitable candidate for the post of Assistant Public prosecutor- 31 (thirty one) posts in the Court of Ld. Judicial Magistrate and Ld. Executive Magistrate under West Tripura District. | 26/11/2024 | 06/12/2024 | |
| Applications in plain paper are invited from the suitable candidate for the post of Public Prosecutor (1 post) and Addl. Public Prosecutor (3 posts) in the Court of Ld. Sessions Judge and Ld. Addl. Session Judge, under West Tripura District.
